content:
Oh, just the simple landing page as long as they can click on the X's, but I feel like where we're gonna get more stuck just as it being the simple process is figuring out how to , like properly spiral out each step, because because I did the first two, like, roughly, but it seems very bland and basic and not, like, the info I want.

And so I think that's what's gonna take up a lot of time, so that's kind of what we should focus on right now because I don't know, because it's that's fighting isn't is it's not exactly what I want.

I want it to be.

Right.

Ially, it's part of my, it's the base of my puzzle.

And then depending on, so like with health and healing, there'll be either the word in, like, the little textbook figureript, script like, under it. And then write, like, why water droplet cells, a diagram, maybe, but then have like a big, fancy aesthetic and clean, but like, collage that the spiral sits on top of, and then you click on so that it's a lot more visually appealing.

But, right, and so I'm like, so that's just kind of where I'm stuck as I don't know how intends to make the picture, but I don't want to start and just make a picture and then, right, spend weeks on that and then dive into the info if we can get the info out first with the rough, then people can start going through it and giving us feedback while we're playing around and figuring out how to make the front page the best.
